## Description

Library to manage NodeJS infrastructure in Meli apps.

## Install

```sh
npm install --save @meli/node-infra
```

## Usage

### getAvailableConcurrency

Function to get the number of available CPUs in the running Fury instance.

#### Example - getAvailableConcurrency

```js
import { getAvailableConcurrency } from '@meli/node-infra';

const cpus = getAvailableConcurrency();
console.log('CPU Count: ', cpus);
// CPU Count: 4
```
